name: Dharma

skills.name: Heart Meridian Mantra
skills.description: When using skills, he gains Physical and Magical Defense, as well as enhanced Basic Attacks that inflict extra damage and slow.

skills.name: Formlessness Mantra
skills.description: Dashes forward, dealing damage to enemies and crowd controlling them.

skills.name: Enlightenment Mantra
skills.description: Damages enemies in front of him and recovers Health.

skills.name: Truth Mantra
skills.description: Damages nearby enemies and knocks them back. If an enemy is knocked back into a wall, they take extra damage and are stunned.

skillsZh.name: 真言・心經
skillsZh.description: 達摩使用技能後強化物理防禦和法術防禦，獲得強化普攻，額外造成傷害和減速效果。

skillsZh.name: 真言・無相
skillsZh.description: 達摩向前位移，控制敵人並造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 真言・明王
skillsZh.description: 達摩對前方敵人造成傷害並回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 真言・普渡
skillsZh.description: 達摩造成傷害並擊退身邊敵人，若將敵人擊退到牆體，則會造成額外傷害和暈眩。

tips: Build: Pure Sky, Starbreaker, Sage's Sanctuary.
tipsZh: 達摩（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 52.17%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：純淨蒼穹、碎星錘、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.detail: "Currently, Dharma is relatively weak, so we've reduced the cooldown of his Ultimate to give him more opportunities to knock opponents into walls. Since his Skill 2's stationary punch is difficult to land on agile opponents, we've shortened the stock time for his Skill 1, allowing him to better adjust the position of his Skill 2."

patchHistory.change: Raised the base damage of his Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail:
Raised the base damage of his Skill 2.
This change to Dharma makes him a more powerful and interesting. We hope that players will find this version of him to be a dependable choice in the Clash Lane or jungler hero pool. By strengthening the base damage of his Skill 2, he will be able to deal a good amount of damage during a fast-moving fight.

patchHistory.change: We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
patchHistory.detail:
We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Dharma's original skill specialties required players to invest a certain amount of practice to make use of their full strength.As more and more heroes have been added, even expert Dharma players sometimes find it hard to compete with him in Hero's Gorge.We've injected Dharma with new power in this latest version, which we hope will make him more effective in combat for new players and veterans alike.

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低1技能和3技能的冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 目前達摩強度偏低，我們降低他大招的冷卻時間，給他更多的機會嘗試將對手擊退到牆體上；2技能原地揮拳很難命中靈活的對手，因此我們縮短1技能儲存時間，讓他能更好地調整2技能的位置。

提高2技能基礎傷害
重製後的達摩變得比以前更強、更有趣，我們希望他能在目前版本中成為更多對抗路或打野玩家英雄池中的可靠選擇之一。我們強化達摩2技能的基礎傷害，使他在節奏快速的戰鬥中，能更快打出足夠傷害。

patchHistoryZh.change: We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Dharma's original skill specialties required players to invest a certain amount of practice to make use of their full strength.As more and more heroes have been added, even expert Dharma players sometimes find it hard to compete with him in Hero's Gorge.We've injected Dharma with new power in this latest version, which we hope will make him more effective in combat for new players and veterans alike.

faqs.question: Is Dharma good in current season?
faqs.answer: Dharma is Tier B Tank with 52.17% win rate, 0.22% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Dharma build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Pure Sky, Starbreaker, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Eye of the Phoenix, Glacial Buckler.

faqs.question: How to counter Dharma?
faqs.answer: Pick Xiang Yu, Diaochan. Strong into Wang Zhaojun, Han Xin.

faqsZh.question: 達摩 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 達摩 為 B 梯度，勝率 52.17%、選取 0.22%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 達摩 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：純淨蒼穹、碎星錘、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、不死鳥之眼、極寒風暴.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 達摩？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Xiang Yu、Diaochan。達摩 克制 Wang Zhaojun、Han Xin。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Wang Zhaojun, Han Xin. Weak into: Xiang Yu, Diaochan.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Wang Zhaojun、Han Xin；被克制：Xiang Yu、Diaochan

guide.overview: Dharma is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.2% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dharma: When using skills, he gains Physical and Magical Defense,as well as enhanced basic atacks that inflict extra damage and slow.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, then complete Immovable - Sky Dome, Demonsbane, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Dharma's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Formlessness Mantra → Enlightenment Mantra → Truth Mantra → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Truth Mantra (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Formlessness Mantra, and Truth Mantra on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Formlessness Mantra → Enlightenment Mantra → Truth Mantra → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Dharma sits at Tier B globally (52.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Dharma vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Dharma has +0.8% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Dharma when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Dharma vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 0.1% more often globally. Choose Dharma when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Dharma excels into Wang Zhaojun, Han Xin. Avoid blind picking into Xiang Yu, Diaochan without team peel.
